notes: armeabi-v7a pdocker-direct is an explicit unsupported-ABI stub until ARM32 ptrace/syscall support is implemented.
armeabi-v7a glibc GPU payloads are packaged experimental evidence until Vulkan handle storage is pointer-width clean.
